MDP_OL_PLS_START_OFS_INJ2_NVT[2].comment: MDP open loop pulse for injector 2 in "Medium" zone

MDP_OL_PLS_START_OFS_INJ2_NVT[1].comment: MDP open loop pulse for injector 2 in "Low" zone

MDP_OL_PLS_START_OFS_INJ2_NVT[0].comment: MDP open loop pulse for injector 2 in "Idle" zone

MDP_OL_PLS_START_OFS_INJ1_NVT[3].comment: MDP open loop pulse for injector 1 in "High" zone

MDP_OL_PLS_START_OFS_INJ1_NVT[2].comment: MDP open loop pulse for injector 1 in "Medium" zone

MDP_OL_PLS_START_OFS_INJ1_NVT[1].comment: MDP open loop pulse for injector 1 in "Low" zone

MDP_OL_PLS_START_OFS_INJ1_NVT[0].comment: MDP open loop pulse for injector 1 in "Idle" zone

Max_fuel.comment: Maximum fuel quantity allowed on any injection cycle.

Max_fuel_reduced_mode.comment: Max fuel reduced mode fuelling demand

Max_fuel_oil_temp_corr.comment: Max fuel corr with oil temp map output

Max_fuel_air_corr.comment: Max fuel corr with coolant temp map output

Max_fuel_airdns.comment: Max fuel limitation according to air charge

Max_fuel_atmosp_map.comment: Max fuel atmospheric pressure fuelling demand map output

InjectorCode.hexa.1.comment: donnée de corrections individualisées de l'injecteur pour le cylindre 1

InjectorCode.hexa.2.comment: donnée de corrections individualisées de l'injecteur pour le cylindre 2

InjectorCode.hexa.3.comment: donnée de corrections individualisées de l'injecteur pour le cylindre 3

InjectorCode.hexa.4.comment: donnée de corrections individualisées de l'injecteur pour le cylindre 4

InjectorCode.hexa.All.comment: donnée de corrections individualisées de l'injecteur pour tous les cylindres

AFE_Estim_maf.comment: Air flow per stroke estimated from Air Mass Flow Estimator

Driver_fuel_unfiltered.comment: Driver fuel calculated from the pedal position and engine speed. With no acceleration or deceleratio

FTD_Calc_injected_fuel_demand.comment: The injected fuel demand before checking

FTD_Checked_after_fuel_demand.comment: After fuel demand after flow arbitration

Gear_ratio_raw.comment: An unfiltered value for the current gear. This value may be incorrect in transient conditions.

Idle_ref_raised.comment: Engine speed used in the calculation of the PID component Idle_integral.

Driver_AC_fuel.comment: Driver fuel demand corrected with AC fuel demand

AC_Fuel_offset.comment: AC compressor loss correcting fuel demand

AC_fuel_offset_use_NVV.comment: Selection of AC fuel offset strategy use for fixed capacity compressor

Acc_decode_test_performed.comment: Indicates that the accelerometer is well mounted
